I’m Bob. Lucy and Lily are my classmates and they are twin sisters. They look the same, but they also have some differences. They are both beautiful, but Lucy is a little fatter and taller than Lily. They always wear the same clothes. They both like blue best and don’t like red or green. They both have blue schoolbags and bikes. They often go to school by bike together. They are in the same class and they are deskmates. Lucy likes Chinese and science. She speaks Chinese well. She often talks with Chinese students after class.
